description: To know what this controls, see Facet Anchors.

fields.Open: Whether the facet anchors are open or closed.
fields.UseFacetAnchors: Whether to allow the use of facet anchors.
fields.Toggle: What controller toggles facet anchors when opening dash.
fields.AnimSpeed: How fast the facet anchors should open or close.
fields.Dash: The dash that is in the world this component is managing facet anchors for.
fields.ProfileName: The name of the profile to use when loading the facet anchors.
fields.Anchors: A list of facet anchors and their data.
